item.name: Bulk Journal Import
item.description: APIs for bulk importing journal vouchers via CSV.

request.description:
Import multiple journal entries from a CSV file. Each journal entry is grouped by posting_date.

CSV columns:
- ledger_name (required): Name of the ledger account
- debit (required): Debit amount (use 0 if credit)
- credit (required): Credit amount (use 0 if debit)
- posting_date (required): Date in Y-m-d format
- candidate_id (optional): Employee/candidate ID
- note (optional): Transaction note

Get a simplified list of invoice services for dropdowns, including nested lines.
Returns format: {id, text, lines: [...]}
Display a listing of the resource.
Store a newly created resource in storage.

variable.description: The ID of the invoice service.

request.description: Display the specified resource.

variable.description: The ID of the invoice service.

request.description: Update the specified resource in storage.

variable.description: The ID of the invoice service.

request.description: Remove the specified resource from storage.

item.name: Journal Entries
item.description: APIs for managing journal entries (headers) with nested transaction lines.

query.description: Field to sort by (id, posting_date, status, total_debit, total_credit, created_at, updated_at, posted_at).

request.description: Get a paginated list of journal entries with optional filtering and sorting.
Store a newly created journal entry with nested transaction lines.

variable.description: The ID of the journal entry.

request.description: Display the details of a specific journal entry with nested lines.

variable.description: The ID of the journal entry.

request.description: Update the details of a specific journal entry and its nested lines.

variable.description: The ID of the journal entry to delete.

request.description: Remove a specific journal entry and its transaction lines from the database.

item.name: Journal Transaction Lines
item.description: APIs for querying journal transaction lines from posted journal vouchers.

query.description: Field to sort by (id, journal_header_id, ledger_id, debit, credit, created_at, updated_at).
Filter to only include posted journal entries.
Filter by transaction type (debit or credit).
Search across notes and ledger names.

request.description:
Get a paginated list of journal transaction lines with optional filtering.
By default, returns lines from posted journal vouchers.

item.name: Ledger of Accounts
item.description: APIs for managing ledger accounts with filtering, sorting, and pagination.

request.description:
Get a simplified list of ledger accounts optimized for Select2/dropdown menus.
Returns format: {id, text, type, group}

query.description: Search by name, mobile, CL number.

request.description: Specialized lookup for customers that searches in CRM fields (mobile, etc).

query.description: Search across name, group, and note.

request.description: Get a paginated list of ledger accounts with optional filtering and sorting.
Store a newly created ledger account in the database.

variable.description: The ID of the ledger account.

request.description: Display the details of a specific ledger account.

variable.description: The ID of the ledger account.

request.description: Update the details of a specific ledger account.

variable.description: The ID of the ledger account to delete.

request.description: Remove a specific ledger account from the database.

item.name: Package One
item.description:
APIs for creating Package One journal entries (financial impact only).
Invoices are created separately via InvoiceController.

item.name: Create Received Voucher for Package One

request.description:
Create a receipt voucher for Package One, linked to an Invoice as source.
The customer's ledger account is used as the credit side, and the provided
debit_ledger_id is used as the debit side (e.g., Cash/Bank).

item.name: Create Credit Note for Package One

request.description:
Create a credit note that reverses the original journal entries for an invoice.
The original debit becomes credit and vice versa. The invoice will be marked as refunded.

item.name: Create Charging Entry for Package One

request.description:
Create a charging journal entry with custom lines (ledger_id with debit/credit amounts).
The invoice is referenced as the source.
Get a paginated list of Package One journal entries.

Create journal entries for Package One (financial impact only).
The cn_number will be stored in all journal transaction lines.
Invoice creation is handled separately via InvoiceController.
Display a specific Package One journal entry.
Delete a Package One journal entry and its lines.

item.name: Receipt Vouchers
item.description: APIs for managing receipt vouchers with automatic journal entry creation.

query.description: Field to sort by (id, serial_number, status, payment_mode, created_at, updated_at).
Sort in descending order (true or false).

request.description: Get a paginated list of receipt vouchers with optional filtering and sorting.

Store a newly created receipt voucher with automatic journal entry creation.
The journal entry will be created with a debit to the specified debit_ledger_id
and a credit to the credit_ledger_id for the specified amount.

variable.description: The ID of the receipt voucher.

request.description: Display the details of a specific receipt voucher with its source and journal entry.

variable.description: The ID of the receipt voucher.

request.description: Update the details of a specific receipt voucher and its associated journal entry.

variable.description: The ID of the receipt voucher to delete.

request.description: Remove a specific receipt voucher and its associated journal entry from the database.

item.name: Statement of Account
item.description: APIs for retrieving statement of account for a ledger.

request.description:
Retrieve the statement of account for a specific ledger. Returns all posted
journal transaction lines with debit, credit, running balance, notes, and source type.

item.name: Trial Balance
item.description: APIs for retrieving trial balance report data.

query.description: Filter by spacial type (e.g., 3 for Customer).

request.description:
Retrieve a trial balance report with ledger accounts organized by class, group, and sub-class.
Each ledger shows total debits, total credits, closing balance, and balance type (DR/CR).
Ledgers with zero closing balance are excluded.

item.name: Typing Transaction Government Invoices
item.description: APIs for managing Typing Transaction Government Invoices.

item.name: Receive payment for a typing invoice

variable.description: The ID of the typing invoice.

request.description:
Create a receipt voucher for a specific typing invoice and record the payment
with proper journal entries. This endpoint creates a ReceiptVoucher linked to
the typing invoice via polymorphic relationship and updates the amount_received.

query.description: Field to sort by (id, serial_no, gov_dw_no, created_at, updated_at).

request.description: Get a paginated list of items with optional filtering and sorting.
Store a newly created item.
Display the details of a specific item.
Update the details of a specific item.

variable.description: The ID of the item to delete.

request.description: Remove a specific item from the database.
